execution_summary: The R Markdown analysis was executed successfully after adjusting for missing Excel files and ensuring the correct structure of the data. The analysis focused on aversiveness ratings using linear mixed models.

code_executed.logs: The analysis was completed successfully, generating the output file Analysis.html.
code_executed.environment: R environment with packages rio, lme4, lmerTest, reshape

results.hypothesis_tested: Covid-19 humor will be perceived as more aversive compared to non-pandemic humor.
